# Applying a Code

To apply a promotional code during checkout, users must enter it in the designated field. It is important to note that only one code can be utilized for each order. If a code does not apply, it may be due to an unmet minimum order value or a restriction that excludes certain items in the shopping cart.

[Source: promo_codes.md#applying-a-code]
